news.t: Amplify ETFs Completes Acquisition to Reach $9.1 Billion AUM Across 31 ETFs
Israel ETFs tumble the most since March 2020 as Israel-Hamas conflict intensifies
Cybersecurity Stocks With Ties to Israel Are Under Pressure as War Unfolds

holdings.infoBox: ITEQ is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings. The top holdings are Tower Semiconductor stock at 11.62%, Elbit Systems at 11.60%, Nova Ltd. at 5.89%, JFrog at 5.34%, and Check Point Software Technologies at 4.38%.

overview.description: The Amplify BlueStar Israel Technology ETF (ITEQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the BlueStar Israel Global Technology index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index composed of Israeli technology companies. The fund provides exposure to various industries, including biotech, healthcare, defense tech, clean energy, water tech, and life sciences ITEQ was launched on Nov 2, 2015 and is issued by Amplify Investments.

data.title: Cybersecurity Stocks With Ties to Israel Are Under Pressure as War Unfolds
data.text: The country is home to 33% of the world's unicorns in cybersecurity, the Israel National Cyber Directorate said last year.
